subcodes.first_line: The dawn hath broken forth, and the cock hath crowed, and the nightingale warbleth upon the branches. Dominion belongeth unto God, the Mighty, the All-Bountiful [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد طلع الفجر و دلع الدیک و العندلیب تغرد علی الاغصان الملک لله العزیز المنان
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @consolation and comfort, @exhortations and counsels, @suffering and imprisonment, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
